response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:45: Performer introduces, ambient music, no vocal song. 2. 02:46-04:59: Vocal performance of 'BANZAI'. Identified on-screen composer 'マサ' (Masa) and song title 'BANZAI'. 3. Search query: 'BANZAI マサ lyrics' successfully found the lyrics on uta-net.com.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performer giving an introductory greeting and then performing the song 'BANZAI'.

scenes.description: The virtual performer waves and introduces the song, followed by a transition with ambient music.
The virtual performer sings and dances to the song 'BANZAI'. On-screen text credits: 作詞・作曲: マサ (Masa), 編曲: 田中タリラ (Tanaka Tarira).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
BANZAI BANZAI 翼広げて
希望の場所へと今走り出そう
誰より高く飛ぼうとしていた
懐かしい日々が背中押すけど
勇気の羽は傷ついて
誰かの言葉を待っている日々
好きなことがいつか義務に変わって
予定より思い出が増えていった
BANZAI BANZAI 翼広げて
希望の場所へと今走り出そう
夢が詰まった空のポケット
思い出持ってく余裕なんてないさ
今日があるのは未来の君と
愛を育むためだけにあるんだ
習ったこと忘れはみ出して生きろ
教科書の落書きは消さないで24色で色付けろ
BANZAI BANZAI 翼広げて
希望の場所へと今走り出そう
古い地図など捨ててしまおう
ここから始まる新しいアドベンチャー
hello hello 扉開いて
自由な空へと飛び出そうぜ今
BANZAI BANZAI 翼広げて
希望の場所へと今走り出そう
the time to change 勇気を出して
everything i can do 思いのまま
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
BANZAI BANZAI Spread your wings
Let's run to the place of hope now
I tried to fly higher than anyone else
The nostalgic days push me from behind
But my wings of courage are wounded
Days of waiting for someone's words
What I like eventually turns into an obligation
Memories increased more than planned
BANZAI BANZAI Spread your wings
Let's run to the place of hope now
My sky pocket is filled with dreams
There's no room to take memories with me
Today exists only for me to foster love with you in the future
Forget what you learned and live by going beyond the boundaries
Don't erase the graffiti in your textbook, color it with 24 colors
BANZAI BANZAI Spread your wings
Let's run to the place of hope now
Let's throw away old maps
A new adventure begins from here
Hello Hello Open the door
Let's jump out into the free sky now
BANZAI BANZAI Spread your wings
Let's run to the place of hope now
The time to change, get the courage
Everything I can do, just as I want
